headline: PGIM Appoints Robert Sockin as US Economist
summary: NEWARK, N.J., March 31, 2026--PGIM has named Robert Sockin as its U.S. economist, effective immediately. With $1.5 trillion in assets under management*, PGIM is a leading global asset manager and among the largest global fixed income managers.

headline: Ryan Krueger Starts PRU at Market Perform, Sees Mixed Sector Backdrop
summary: Prudential Financial, Inc. (NYSE:PRU) is included among the 14 Safest Stocks with Highest Dividends. On March 26, Keefe Bruyette & Woods analyst Ryan Krueger re-initiated coverage of Prudential Financial, Inc. (NYSE:PRU) with a Market Perform rating. The firm set a $106 price target on the stock.
